_doc: Dev fixture for the canonical Cliros test property. Loaded by seed_fixture_report.ts to create a report at panel_review-complete state, so the persona stages (chain_analysis→lien_analysis→defect_review→aol_lock) can be re-run WITHOUT re-hitting GSCCCA and WITHOUT corrupting live state. Chain is the real surviving artifact from report c53fc39b (persona_passes chain_analysis, 2026-05-30). Liens reconstructed faithfully from the audited 22-row set (the original was lost when an empty persona payload wiped the array — the exact bug the data-loss guard now prevents). This is a DEV fixture, not customer data; the real audit runs a fresh GSCCCA search.

property.full_address: 1394 Peachtree Battle Ave NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
property.legal_description: Tax Parcel 17 019500030386, Fulton County, Georgia, containing 1.41 acres more or less. Refer to most recent recorded deed for full metes-and-bounds.

entries.notes: 2001 vesting deed — co-grantees of record are CHAD EDWARD and CHRISTINA (indexed CHRISTINA HULL). Both took record title as co-tenants. Confirm on image that CHRISTINA HULL = CHRISTINA H EIKHOFF (the 2024 QCD grantor).

entries.grantor: NEWMAN, MERIN DAVID / SULLIVAN, EDWARD J
entries.notes: Surname mismatch with prior grantee — no bridging instrument 2001→2011; true chain break.

OUT-DEED from CHAD EDWARD with grantee indexed 'Unknown'. Unreconciled out-conveyance = open finding (notes, NOT breaks[]). Runs from Chad's interest; the 2024 QCD (from CHRISTINA, the 2001 CO-GRANTEE) conveys HER record co-tenancy interest and does NOT round-trip this out-deed.

Most-recent conveyance; CHRISTINA H (the 2001 co-grantee, indexed CHRISTINA HULL) quitclaims HER record co-tenancy interest to CHAD E — NOT merely a spousal interest. Grantee CHAD E = current owner → vesting deed. Bare QCD; M&B from a full warranty in-deed. Confirm CHRISTINA HULL = CHRISTINA H EIKHOFF on image.

breaks: Chain break 2001-09-17 (Bk 30998-573) → 2011-03-28 (Bk 49942-4): grantee EIKHOFF, CHAD EDWARD does not match subsequent grantors NEWMAN/SULLIVAN; no recorded bridging conveyance.

liens.notes: 2001 SD, borrower EIKHOFF; active of record.
2001 SD, borrower EIKHOFF; active of record.
2003 orphan cancellation — no indexed referenced book/page.
2024 SD co-recorded with the QCD vesting; current-owner encumbrance.
